fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Stable unique identifier for one Tg measurement record.

fields.name: polymer_name
fields.description: Common or IUPAC name of the polymer as given in the source.
fields.normalization_rule: Preserve original name; add canonical alias in notes if differs.

fields.name: repeat_unit_smiles
fields.description: SMILES of the polymer repeat unit with * as polymerization markers.
fields.normalization_rule: Canonicalize via RDKit; replace [*] with * before parsing.

fields.name: polymer_class
fields.description: Broad structural class of the polymer.

fields.name: tg_value
fields.description: Tg value as reported in the source, in the unit given by tg_unit.

fields.name: tg_unit
fields.description: Unit of tg_value as reported in the source.
fields.normalization_rule: Store as reported; compute tg_value_K separately.

fields.name: tg_value_K
fields.description: Tg converted to Kelvin for cross-source comparison. tg_value_K = tg_value if K; tg_value + 273.15 if C.

fields.name: tg_uncertainty
fields.description: Reported standard deviation or uncertainty in the same unit as tg_value.

fields.name: measurement_method
fields.description: Experimental technique used to measure Tg.

fields.name: heating_rate_K_min
fields.description: Heating or cooling rate during DSC or DMA measurement, in K/min.

fields.name: molecular_weight_g_mol
fields.description: Number-average (Mn) or weight-average (Mw) molecular weight in g/mol.

fields.name: mw_type
fields.description: Type of molecular weight reported. Required when molecular_weight_g_mol is present.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: Identifier linking this record to an entry in specs/source_map.json.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Category of the source this record came from.

fields.name: doi
fields.description: Digital Object Identifier of the source when available.

fields.name: conflict_flag
fields.description: True if another source reports a different Tg (delta > 10 K) for the same repeat_unit_smiles.

fields.name: extraction_method
fields.description: How the record was extracted from its source.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-text curation notes, caveats, or provenance details.
fields.example: Tg from Table 1; heating rate 10 K/min inferred from methods section.
